headline: Saturday snacking stops now—exercise is non-negotiable
summary: Stop emotional snacking today; hit the rowing machine hard to close your 0.52kg weekly deficit gap.
details: Replace emotional snacking with two Huel meals today and stick to planned vegan foods—no extras. Get 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill today; your current pace is 0.52kg/week short of target. Today matters because you're 1905 days behind schedule, and Saturday is your proven weakness—break that pattern now.
